output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?age WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P154 wd:Q184151 .
  ?edition wdt:P577 ?eventDate .
  ?edition wdt:P2004 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) >= 2014 && YEAR(?eventDate) <= 2023)
  BIND(YEAR(?eventDate) - YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?age)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?age
